title: urachne asperifolia
intro: Urachne asperifolia, also known as the scaly club moss, is a type of club moss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Urachne asperifolia has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
